fault_hypothesis: On line 70, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When fewer values than `window` are available, this produces an incorrect (too small) average.

constraints.intent: avg should equal total divided by the actual number of tail elements, not by window
After computing avg, avg * len(tail) should equal total when tail is non-empty

spec.expr: len(tail__1) >= window or abs(avg__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: Before returning avg, if tail is shorter than window the avg must be based on len(tail) not window

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - sum(values[-window:]) / len(values[-window:])) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: The returned average must equal the mean of the actual tail elements, not total/window
